title: The Colosseum Draws the Strongest Fighters
description: Pages 1–4 focus on the colosseum draws the strongest fighters, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the characters active in this scene.
scene: This part follows Kinemon, Zoro, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #10, Unknown person #11, Unknown person #12, Unknown person #13 as dressrosa’s Corrida Colosseum becomes the center of attention as Luffy enters under the name Lucy and learns the Flame-Flame Fruit is the prize.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: forward all the damage claims to here...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: you... but no, it couldn't be...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: think he's someone with a real bad reputation...?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Either way... he's no ordinary guy ...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: It must have been hiding from plain sight

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: In all this dust and smoke!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Was he some kind of pick- pocket?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Looks like we've all been had.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: A fairy has taken it all away.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: What are you talking about? You mean some guy named fairy stole our things?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: No. I mean fairies. All you can do is have a laugh and forget about it...

summary: Pages 1–4 focus on the colosseum draws the strongest fighters, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the characters active in this scene.
